statement: In every magma, Equation 1688 (`x = (y * x) * ((x * z) * y)`) implies Equation 3100 (`x = (((x * y) * z) * w) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0491
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op x z) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op x y) z) w) w)
